steps.stepTitle: The problem — what your buyer already knows
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the prospect's pain point, stated in their language, not yours.] Right now, [your buyer's role] wastes [time or money] on [painful thing]. Every [timeframe], that means [cost or consequence]. This is the problem [your product] was built to eliminate.

steps.stepTitle: The cost — make the pain concrete
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: a specific, quantified cost of the problem — time, money, headcount, or risk.] Teams like yours spend [N hours/week] on this manually. At [average hourly rate], that is [dollar cost] every month — not counting the mistakes that slip through. [Product] takes that number to near zero.

steps.stepTitle: The solution — your product in action
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the first impression of your product — what the buyer sees and why it immediately signals value.] This is [product name]. From here, [buyer's role] can [core capability] in [timeframe]. No [painful prerequisite] required. No [frustrating limitation]. Just results.

overlays.title: This saves your team hours every week.

steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the single most compelling feature your buyers consistently respond to in live demos. Show it, don't tell it.] Watch what happens when I [do the key thing]. [Specific result] appears in [timeframe]. That normally takes [competitor or manual process] [much longer]. Here it is live.

[Replace with: the feature your competitors cannot match or have not shipped. Name the gap explicitly.] Here is what makes [product] different. [Competitor / manual approach] requires [painful step]. We eliminated it entirely. [Describe what happens instead in one sentence.]

steps.stepTitle: Get started — the call to action
steps.generatedText: [Replace with: the transition to the CTA — restate the outcome and lower the activation barrier.] You have seen the problem. You have seen what [product] does about it. Getting started takes [N minutes]. No [long contract / IT approval / migration] required. Here is where to begin.

[Replace with: the exact CTA copy and what happens after the prospect clicks — trial, demo request, or self-serve signup.] Click [CTA label]. [What happens next — 'You will be in your first project in 60 seconds' or 'Our team will reach you within one business day'].  No credit card needed to get started.

[Replace with: the post-conversion experience — what the prospect sees immediately after clicking the CTA.] Here is what you see the moment you sign up. [Describe the first screen, the onboarding prompt, or the email they receive.] Most customers see their first [result] within [timeframe].

aiOutputs.title: Product Demo — Sales Narrative
aiOutputs.summary: [Replace with: one benefit-led sentence naming the product, the problem it solves, and the outcome a prospect can expect after signing up.]
